final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration
Asset type: anime-style sports illustration
Primary request: basketball player mid-air performing a slam dunk with sweat flying, dynamic motion blur, full of tension and passion
Scene/backdrop: crowded basketball arena with cheering audience and camera flashes in the background
Subject: athletic basketball player in team jersey, muscular build, intense determined expression, airborne with ball above rim
Style/medium: anime/manga illustration, shonen sports aesthetic, bold linework, cel-shaded with dynamic action lines
Composition/framing: low-angle dramatic shot, wide angle emphasizing vertical leap, player dominates foreground
Lighting/mood: dramatic arena spotlights mixed with flash photography bursts, high energy and adrenaline
Color palette: saturated team colors, warm court tones, cool shadow accents, bright flash highlights
Materials/textures: glossy sweat droplets, fabric jersey folds, polished wooden court, motion streak effects
Constraints: maintain dynamic pose with clear silhouette, show sweat particles in motion
Avoid: static pose, flat lighting, realistic proportions, photorealistic rendering, watermark
